scenes.description: Intro screen for Omaru Polka's Birthday Live 2026, displaying event information and song reveal teaser.
Upbeat instrumental intro as the live performance begins on a large, heart-themed 3D stage with audience cheering.

New song reveal!
Glitter of Love
